name: Frostleaf
description: __Birth Place:__ Columbia Frostleaf is a former Columbian Junior Army soldier, "retired" after her unit was destroyed. Came into contact with Rhodes Island later as a mercenary, before officially joining following a period of collaboration with the company. With an extensive combat experience and undeniably skilled, Frostleaf is an excellent asset to Rhodes Island.

His daring actions eventually bring him to the attention of Colonel Hayato Jin, who has him join NISAR and become one of the three pilots of Getter Robo Go. description: Ryan Nam is one of the main characters as one of the main leads of the series. He is also a werewolf and likes Emma Ji. He is currently a college student and is a neighbor of Emma.

name: Hana Bradley
description: __Height:__ 153 cm She is a bomb expert and former assassin associated with her family. She is currently a kindergarten teacher and in charge of the dandelion class with Rita and Doug.

name: Hasta
description: A Hastur (alien species), who attended the same space kindergarden and space elementary school with Nyaruko and Chtuko. Despite Hastur's appearence, Hastur is actually a boy. Nyaruko and Cthuko call him "Hasuta-kun". He possess the power of air, and is known to be stronger than both Nyaruko and Cthuko, since he was the one who always stopped their fight during space elementary school. Hastur is based on Hastur: The deity of the wind. Hasuta (Shouen version in season 2) is voiced by Seki Tomokazu

name: Hong Meiling

She is known for her mastery of the martial arts, part of which can be seen from her movement which is performed with Shin-Kyaku (a move in Chinese martial arts). name: Kanoko Kikuchiya
description: A rich girl that Nitta was assigned to. Kanoko is a lonely person belonging to a rich family, with a father and a stepmother, Yoriko. At first, her relationship with Shin only appears to be a forced relationship, with Kanoko taking advantage of the debt to command Nitta to do her errands. However, this changes as Shin learns of her childhood, and bonds closer with Kanoko. She is addicted to sex, as she was influenced by her other friends.
